rationale: The citing paper references Jap and Ganesan (2000) mainly as one item in literature lists on interdependence operationalization and as a prior empirical result showing a positive asymmetry-commitment link. These mentions help document mixed prior findings but do not assign a distinct conceptual or methodological role to that specific paper. The 2003 study does not build directly on Jap and Ganesan's life-cycle/control framework, nor does it reuse its model or measures in a targeted way.
